description: Multiple PHP remote file inclusion vulnerabilities in Der Dirigent (DeDi) 1.0.3 allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary PHP code via a URL in the cfg_dedi[dedi_path] parameter in (1) find.php, (2) insert_line.php, (3) fullscreen.php, (4) changecase.php, (5) insert_link.php, (6) insert_table.php, (7) table_cellprop.php, (8) table_prop.php, (9) table_rowprop.php, (10) insert_page.php, and possibly insert_marquee.php in backend/external/wysiswg/popups/.
